name: kpi
description: Executive KPI system — one base, five layout modifiers.
purpose: Use for KPI dashboards with status framing — current value, target, trend, attention-needed. The variants tune the visual emphasis.

title.description: Slide heading naming the KPI group.

kpis.description: One li per KPI. Lead with **Metric name** then nested bullets for value, target, trend, status.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: kpi -->

### Financial · Q4 2026
## Revenue ahead of plan; margin and cash both expanded.

1. **$2.4B**
   - Total revenue
   - target $2.2B · +9% `On plan` `Board`
2. **42%**
   - Gross margin
   - +2pp QoQ `On plan` `Audit`
3. **$1.1B**
   - Cash & equivalents
   - +$180M QoQ `On plan` `Investor`
